prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: db_108155 Product Type: OUTDOOR_LIVING Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: ASR Outdoor 12.5 Inch Heavy Duty Plastic Black Sand Scooper for Metal Detecting Description: Going treasure hunting? Then you need the ASR Outdoor 12.5" Black Sand Scooper!

This sand scooper is super lightweight, making it ideal for scooping up sand to shake out treasures on dry, sandy beaches. Since it's constructed of durable plastic, it wont interfere with your metal detector making it easier to find treasure.

Simply use your metal detector to locate the target area, and start scooping out sand until you find your treasure. Make sure you have one of these before your next treasure hunt!

Package Includes:
-(1) ASR Outdoor Black Sand Scoop Search Terms: prospecting Features: - ASR Outdoor Sand Scoop - Black Color - Length: 12.5" - Lanyard Hole in Handle - Material: Heavy Duty Plastic - Ideal for Gold Panning, Treasure Hunting & Gardening === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ASR Outdoor 12.5 Inch Black Heavy Duty Plastic Sand Scooper

openai.item_name: ASR Outdoor 12.5 in Black Sand Scooper

anthropic.title_differentiation: Metal Detecting, Gold Panning, Treasure Hunting, Lightweight Plastic Construction, Lanyard Hole, Non-Magnetic

openai.title_differentiation: Heavy Duty Plastic, Lightweight For Metal Detecting, Lanyard Hole Handle, Ideal For Gold Panning And Treasure Hunting
